overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Spider-Man game showing the character walking through illuminated Manhattan city streets at night. The scene features iconic skyscrapers including the Empire State Building, autumn foliage, and light urban traffic with taxis and pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide downtown avenue with iconic skyscrapers

events.description: character lowers gaze from looking up at buildings and begins walking forward steadily

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man stands looking up at the Empire State Building, then begins walking steadily down the wide avenue

entered.detail: tall illuminated art deco skyscraper with distinctive spire and lit crown
modern glass skyscraper with illuminated windows on the left side of the avenue
tall contemporary building with grid-patterned windows on the right
street trees with orange and brown autumn foliage lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Spider-Man looking up at the illuminated Empire State Building and surrounding skyscrapers in a wide downtown avenue. He begins walking forward as the camera follows from behind, capturing the autumn trees and parked cars along the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with illuminated COLEXCO tower ahead

events.description: yellow taxi cab passes by on the right side of the frame
traffic light changes from red to green, vehicles begin moving

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walks through the intersection toward the COLEXCO building, navigating between parked and moving vehicles

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi cab driving through the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: tall skyscraper with illuminated COLEXCO signage at the top, covered in lit windows
tall pole with traffic signals showing red then changing to green

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man approaches a major intersection with the COLEXCO building towering ahead. A yellow taxi passes by on the right as traffic lights change, and the Empire State Building recedes behind as the character moves deeper into the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with concrete traffic dividers and pedestrian crossings

events.description: character turns slightly left while navigating around a concrete traffic structure
moving from open intersection to narrower street with sidewalk and brick buildings

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man crosses the street, navigating around a concrete traffic divider and approaching the sidewalk where pedestrians are gathered

notable_agents.action: man in red jacket standing near a trash can on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large rectangular concrete traffic island or barrier in the middle of the intersection
low-rise building with red brick facade and large windows on the left side

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man navigates around a concrete traffic structure in the middle of the intersection, turning toward a narrower street lined with a brick building on the left. The COLEXCO building fades into the background as the character approaches the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with autumn trees and brick buildings

events.description: character transitions from walking to a slightly faster jog along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walks along the sidewalk passing pedestrians and approaching a red emergency vehicle parked ahead on the street

notable_agents.action: red emergency vehicle with flashing lights parked on the street ahead

entered.detail: large red emergency vehicle resembling an ambulance or fire truck with visible emergency lights
bright red postal mailbox on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man proceeds along the concrete sidewalk next to a brick building, passing autumn trees and pedestrians. A red emergency vehicle is visible ahead parked on the street as the character moves forward through the urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, illuminated downtown avenue into the denser, narrower corridors of a nighttime city. It begins with Spider-Man gazing up at the towering Empire State Building before he starts walking forward past autumn trees and parked cars. As he approaches a major intersection, the Empire State Building recedes into the distance while a yellow taxi passes by and the COLEXCO building looms ahead. The scene then shifts as the character navigates around a concrete traffic structure, turning away from the open intersection toward a narrower street lined with brick architecture. Finally, the camera follows him along a concrete sidewalk past pedestrians and autumn foliage, moving toward a red emergency vehicle parked on the street.
